name: Practical AI Application Development & Refinement
description: Businesses need expertise in developing practical AI applications, integrating AI capabilities, and refining the user experience of AI-generated content or interfaces to ensure they are intuitive, visually consistent, and performant.
pain_points: Intuitive and consistent AI user experience
tech_stack: OpenAI API / Hugging Face Transformers (for AI model integration/testing)
Google Cloud Platform / AWS (for testing deployment & performance metrics)
Custom AI Prototyping Kits (hardware for specific use cases)
